etymology.description: Depicts a small fire on a torch
etymology.interpretation: Originally represented a small flame, akin to the form seen on top of a torch. In modern usage, it has been simplified to denote a dot or point.

examples.chinese: 请在字母上加一个小点(請在字母上加一個小點)。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng zài zìmǔ shàng jiā yī gè xiǎo diǎn.
examples.english: Please add a small dot above the letter.

examples.chinese: 画图时要注意每个点的位置(畫圖時要注意每個點的位置)。
examples.pinyin: Huàtú shí yào zhùyì měi gè diǎn de wèizhì.
examples.english: When drawing, pay attention to the position of each dot.

examples.chinese: 这个符号是由几条线和一个点组成的(這個符號是由幾條線和一個點組成的)。
examples.pinyin: Zhège fúhào shì yóu jǐ tiáo xiàn hé yī gè diǎn zǔchéng de.
examples.english: This symbol is composed of several lines and a dot.
